data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for roll-up analytics by parent account.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Roll-up analytics by parent account', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the business process, such as booking and financial outputs, but do not include any checks or reads related to roll-up analytics or parent account structures. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
gaps: No evidence of roll-up analytics by parent account.
